description: Reference database mapping signature image files to creator metadata

artists.name: Adam Hughes
artists.style_notes: Clean, often AH monogram. Very minimalist — sometimes just 'AH!'
artists.quality_notes: Very small files (1-3KB), minimal detail. May need higher-res samples.

artists.name: Alan Moore
artists.style_notes: Rare, distinctive. Flowing cursive.
artists.quality_notes: Decent resolution, 4 samples.

artists.name: Alex Ross
artists.style_notes: Elegant, sometimes painted. Large flowing signature.
artists.quality_notes: Good resolution (15-17KB), clear images, consistent style visible.

artists.name: Art Adams
artists.style_notes: Detailed, often with character sketch.
artists.quality_notes: Decent resolution, 4 samples.

artists.name: Bill Finger
artists.style_notes: Extremely rare. Batman co-creator.
artists.quality_notes: Small files but legible.

artists.name: Bob Kane
artists.style_notes: Historic, rare. Batman creator. Often dated.
artists.quality_notes: Good range of sizes, one large sample (23KB). Dated samples useful for era comparison.

artists.name: Brian Michael Bendis
artists.style_notes: Bold, readable. Sometimes abbreviated BMB.
artists.quality_notes: Best collection — 8 samples with varied contexts, some dated. Wide size range shows consistency.

artists.name: Chris Claremont
artists.style_notes: Neat cursive. X-Men legend.
artists.quality_notes: Good variety, includes one large sample (17KB).

artists.name: Ed Brubaker
artists.style_notes: Professional. Captain America/Criminal writer.
artists.quality_notes: Decent, 4 samples.

artists.name: Frank Miller
artists.style_notes: Bold, angular. Dark Knight/Sin City creator.
artists.quality_notes: Small files (2-4KB) but recognizable style.

artists.name: Gabriele Dell'Otto
artists.style_notes: European style. Prominent variant cover artist.
artists.quality_notes: Small files (2-5KB). May need better samples.

artists.name: Geoff Johns
artists.style_notes: Clean, professional. Green Lantern/JSA writer.
artists.quality_notes: Decent resolution, 4 samples.

artists.name: George Pérez
artists.style_notes: Detailed, often includes date. Crisis/New Teen Titans legend.
artists.quality_notes: Good variety of sizes, one large (13KB). Deceased — signatures increasingly valuable.

artists.name: Grant Morrison
artists.style_notes: Artistic, sometimes with sigil. Batman/All-Star Superman writer.
artists.quality_notes: Large, clear files (8-16KB). Good quality collection.

artists.name: Greg Capullo
artists.style_notes: Flowing, energetic. Batman/Spawn artist.
artists.quality_notes: Good resolution (5-12KB), clear examples.

artists.name: Ivan Reis
artists.style_notes: Professional, often dated. Green Lantern/Aquaman artist.
artists.quality_notes: Very small files (1-2KB). Needs better resolution samples.

artists.name: Jack Kirby
artists.style_notes: Simple block signature. King of Comics. Deceased — extremely valuable.
artists.quality_notes: Good variety including one large (22KB). Important for high-value authentication.

artists.name: Jae Lee
artists.style_notes: Minimalist. Batman/Inhumans artist.
artists.quality_notes: Mixed sizes, some good detail.

artists.name: James Tynion IV
artists.style_notes: Contemporary style. Batman/Something is Killing the Children writer.
artists.quality_notes: One good large sample (10KB), rest small.

artists.name: Jerry Siegel
artists.style_notes: Historic Superman creator. Deceased — extremely valuable and rare.
artists.quality_notes: One very large sample (81KB), good variety. High-value authentication target.

artists.name: Jim Lee
artists.style_notes: Large flowing signature, often dated. DC Chief Creative Officer. Convention staple.
artists.quality_notes: Excellent collection — large clear files (7-34KB). Top priority for convention matching.

artists.name: Jim Starlin
artists.style_notes: Thanos/Infinity Gauntlet creator. Often signs with character sketches.
artists.quality_notes: Large files (10-47KB) but only 3 samples — MISSING signature #1.

artists.name: Jim Steranko
artists.style_notes: Stylized, artistic. Nick Fury legend.
artists.quality_notes: Large, detailed files (5-42KB). Distinctive style should match well.

missing_priority_artists.name: Todd McFarlane
missing_priority_artists.reason: #1 convention signer, Spawn creator. MUST HAVE for GalaxyCon.

missing_priority_artists.name: Stan Lee
missing_priority_artists.reason: Most recognized comic signature in the world. Tons in eBay data.

missing_priority_artists.name: Rob Liefeld
missing_priority_artists.reason: Signs at every con, very active. Easy to collect samples.

missing_priority_artists.name: J. Scott Campbell
missing_priority_artists.reason: Huge variant cover artist, signs constantly.
